zh.Argyll, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ella House於1302年9月2日出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯時，她的父親John House22歲，母親Lydia Sparling22歲。她與Henry Ramsay結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1338年1月9日在英國蘇格蘭登迪享年35歲。

zh-hans.Argyll, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ella House于1302年9月2日出生在苏格兰Forfarshire奧特豪斯时，她的父亲John House22岁，母亲Lydia Sparling22岁。她与Henry Ramsay结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1338年1月9日在英国苏格兰登迪享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: House
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name for someone employed ‘at the house’, from Middle English hous(e) (Old English hūs), probably a religious house such as a convent. In the Middle Ages the majority of the population lived in cottages or huts rather than houses.

English: perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English huse, a southwest dialect form of Old English hyse ‘place overgrown with (water) plants’, a derivative of Old English hos ‘(water) plant’. In modern English, the name might have been absorbed into Huss or Hose .

variants.name: Huizenga
meanings: West Frisian and Dutch (mainly Groningen): habitational name from Huizinge in Groningen, a placename possibly composed with Middle Dutch huus, huse, Dutch huis ‘house’ (see House ).

variants.name: Houze
meanings: Altered form of   House   4, a surname of German origin (see   Haus  ).
French (Houzé): metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of boots and shoes or a nickname for someone noted for his footwear, from Old French ho(u)se ‘boot, shoe’.

variants.name: Howes
meanings: pronounced to rhyme with hose, a variant of Howe 1 with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. Hose (Leicestershire), recorded as Howes in 1086, is named with the plural of Old English hōh ‘hill spur’.
pronounced to rhyme with cows, a variant of Howe 2 (see Hugh ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Houseman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English hous ‘house’ + man ‘man’, denoting someone employed at ‘the house’, probably a religious house or convent. Compare House .
English: altered form of Oulsnam (itself a variant of Wolstenholme ), with metathesis of final -nam to -man and development of inorganic initial H-.
Americanized form of German   Hausmann   or Dutch   Huisman  .

variants.name: Huse
meanings: North German: from Middle Low German hūs ‘house’ (see House 1), which may also refer to an important building such as the town hall, a castle, or a manor house, so that the name would indicate dwelling in close proximity to these, or perhaps it is an epithet for a servant who worked at a great house.
English (Berkshire): variant of   Hose   and possibly a shortened form of   Hussey  .

nameMeanings.name: Ella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was originally a short form of any of various compound names containing ali ‘other, foreign’ ( compare Eleanor ). It is now often taken to be a variant or pet form of Ellen . It was famously borne by the American jazz singer Ella Fitzgerald ( 1917–1996 ), and has become increasingly popular in Britain since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Ella House was born on 2 September 1302, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, her father, John House, was 22 and her mother, Lydia Sparling, was 22. She married Henry Ramsay. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 9 January 1338, in Dundee, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ella House est née le 2 septembre 1302, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, John House, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lydia Sparling, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Ramsay. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1338, à Dundee, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ella House am 2. September 1302 in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John House 22 und ihre Mutter Lydia Sparling 22. Sie hat Henry Ramsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1338 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Dundee, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Ella Houseが1302年9月2日にスコットランドForfarshireアウチテローウゼで生まれた時，父John Houseは22歳，母Lydia Sparlingは22歳であった。Henry Ramsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1338年1月9日にイギリススコットランドダンディーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ella House(이)가 1302년 9월 2일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오ch터하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John House(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lydia Sparling(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Henry Ramsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 1월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 던디에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ella House родилась 2 сентября 1302 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John House было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lydia Sparling, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Ramsay. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1338 г. в местности дунди, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.
